{{Infobox event
|name=A Mad Tea-Party
|participants=[[Alice]], [[Cheshire Cat]]
|location=[[Wonderland]]
|chapter=Chapter 7
}}

== Overview ==
'''A Mad Tea-Party''' is the endless tea party where time itself has stopped at six o'clock. Alice is quizzed with the riddle ''"Why is a raven like a writing-desk?"'' and leaves in disgust.


[[Category:Events]]
